---
title: "Lessons"
---

## Contents

1. [More on Data Structures](01 More on Data Structures/index.qmd)

2. [More on Objects](02 More on Objects/index.qmd)

3. [Building a Computer](03 Building a Computer/index.qmd)

4. [Beam - Problem Solving with Computers](04 Beam - Problem Solving with Computers/index.qmd)

5. [Beam - Software Engineering](05 Beam - Software Engineering/index.qmd)

6. [Algorithms...Reloaded](06 Algorithms...Reloaded/index.qmd)

7. [Beam - Artificial Intelligence](07 Beam - Artificial Intelligence/index.qmd)

8. [Beam - Git for Beginners](08 Beam - Git/index.qmd)
